reference: THE GENTLEMAN HAD NOT EVEN NEEDED TO SIT DOWN TO BECOME INTERESTED APPARENTLY HE HAD TAKEN UP THE VOLUME FROM A TABLE AS SOON AS HE CAME IN AND STANDING THERE AFTER A SINGLE GLANCE ROUND THE APARTMENT HAD LOST HIMSELF IN ITS PAGES
text: The gentleman had not even needed to sit down to become interested. Apparently, he had taken up the volume from a table as soon as he came in, and standing there, after a single glance round the apartment, had lost himself in its pages.
